mapper.sql: id, session_id, seq_num, role, content, tool_call_id, tool_calls_json, image_urls_json, name, create_by, create_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_agent_message ( session_id, seq_num, role, content, tool_call_id, tool_calls_json, image_urls_json, name, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
(#{m.sessionId}, #{m.seqNum}, #{m.role}, #{m.content}, #{m.toolCallId}, #{m.toolCallsJson}, #{m.imageUrlsJson}, #{m.name}, #{m.createBy}, #{m.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_agent_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
